faq.title: FAQs
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about buying, selling, and trading vehicles on CarTradez.

questions.question: What is CarTradez?
questions.answer: CarTradez is an online platform where you can buy, sell, or trade vehicles easily and safely.

questions.question: How can I contact customer support?
questions.answer: You can reach our support team via the contact page or by emailing info@cartradez.com.

questions.question: How do I list my car for sale?
questions.answer: Simply sign up, go to 'Post an Ad', fill out the form, and upload images to create your listing.

questions.question: Can I negotiate the price?
questions.answer: Yes, you can directly message sellers to negotiate within our secure chat system.
